title: phalaris intermedia var. angusta
intro: Phalaris intermedia var. angusta, commonly known as narrow-leaved canary grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Phalaris intermedia var. angusta include treating fever, rheumatism, and kidney stones, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Phalaris intermedia var. angusta include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
